reasoning_content: We need to determine if 439 is a prime number. Check divisibility: sqrt(439) ≈ 20.95, so test primes up to 19: 2: no (odd), 3: sum digits 4+3+9=16, not divisible by 3, 5: doesn't end in 0/5, 7: 7*62=434, remainder 5, not divisible, 11: 11*39=429, remainder 10, not, 13: 13*33=429, remainder 10, 13*34=442 too high, so not, 17: 17*25=425, remainder 14, 17*26=442 too high, 19: 19*23=437, remainder 2, so not divisible. Thus 439 is prime. Answer yes.
